channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Bhagwant Mann seeks action against AAP Rajya Sabha MPs who defected to BJP, raises constitutional concerns
item.description: Punjab Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann met President Droupadi Murmu to raise serious objections over the recent defection of seven Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) Rajya Sabha MPs to the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP...

item.title: ‘Jesus Christ Superstar’ revival opens in Manila with bold new staging
item.description: The iconic rock opera 'Jesus Christ Superstar' has made a bold return to Manila, captivating local audiences with its daring and contemporary interpretation. Produced by GMG Productions and staged at ...

item.title: Fubara Commends Rivers Workers For Resilience, Backs Tinubu's Economic Reforms At May Day Event
item.description: Rivers State Governor Sir Siminalayi Fubara has used the occasion of Workers’ Day 2026 to commend workers in the state for their resilience, dedication, and key role in the development of Rivers. He s...

item.title: US pauses naval escort in Strait of Hormuz as Iran peace negotiations advance
item.description: United States President Donald Trump announced a temporary pause in the military operation intended to escort ships through the Strait of Hormuz. The decision, which follows requests from Pakistan and...

item.title: Phindo Ngxanga and Tsholofelo Popi Celebrate Their Traditional Wedding
item.description: Phindo Ngxanga, a member of the popular South African band The Soil, recently celebrated his traditional wedding with his partner, Tsholofelo Popi. The couple shared glimpses of their special day on s...

item.title: ASEAN Notes Positive Developments in South China Sea Code of Conduct Talks
item.description: The Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) is seeing constructive progress in its negotiations with China regarding the Code of Conduct (COC) for the South China Sea, according to Dominic Xavi...

item.title: PNP Ensures Safe and Secure COC Filing for BARMM Elections
item.description: The Philippine National Police (PNP) reported that no security threats were recorded during the certificate of candidacy (COC) filing period for the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BA...

item.title: VP Sara calls on government to support the poor to reduce crime and violence
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte has emphasized the importance of prioritizing programs that aid the poor, stressing that addressing poverty can help prevent individuals from turning to crime and violence....

item.title: Ruto and Suluhu Discuss Joint Tanga Oil Refinery Amid Tension During State Visit
item.description: President William Ruto’s state visit to Tanzania on May 4, 2026, aimed at strengthening bilateral ties, sparked controversy after he revealed plans for a joint oil refinery in Tanga without consulting...

item.title: Assembly Election 2026 Updates: TVK Seeks Support to Form Tamil Nadu Govt, TMC Office in Bengal Damaged
item.description: The 2026 Assembly elections across several Indian states have produced notable political shifts. In Tamil Nadu, the newly formed Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK), led by Joseph Vijay, has emerged as the...

item.title: Government completes Phase 1 of India Semiconductor Mission with approval of two Gujarat projects
item.description: The Union Cabinet has approved the final two semiconductor projects under the first phase of the India Semiconductor Mission (ISM 1.0), marking a significant step in India’s push to build a domestic c...

item.title: Trump temporarily suspends U.S. naval escort operation in Strait of Hormuz amid Iran nuclear talks
item.description: President Donald Trump has announced a temporary pause in the U.S. military operation known as 'Project Freedom,' which was launched to guide commercial ships through the strategically vital Strait of...

item.title: South Africa adjusts trade strategy as global protectionism and supply chain shifts intensify
item.description: South Africa is facing a tough and unpredictable global trade environment shaped by rising protectionism, geopolitical tensions, and shifting economic alliances. During a briefing to Parliament’s Port...

item.title: U.S. says offensive operations over as Strait of Hormuz tensions persist
item.description: The United States has declared an end to its offensive military campaign against Iran—dubbed Operation Epic Fury—66 days after the U.S. and Israel began bombing Iranian targets, with Secretary of Stat...

item.title: Profile of Matt Ziering: Husband of Actress Brianne Howey and California Lawyer
item.description: Brianne Howey’s husband, Matt Ziering, is a licensed lawyer based in California who has been a strong pillar in her life and acting career for over a decade. The couple met in Los Angeles through frie...

item.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi Visits Beijing for Talks with China
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi arrived in Beijing for meetings with Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi, according to Iranian state media. The talks are expected to focus on bilateral relations ...

item.title: Pentagon Officials Address Reports of Unusual Weapons, Including Alleged Dolphins, in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: During a Pentagon press briefing on May 5, 2026, reporters questioned Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Joint Chiefs Chairman Gen. Dan Caine about unusual reports that Iran might use 'kamikaze dolphi...

item.title: Supporting Indigenous Australians to access and succeed at university
item.description: Across Australia, First Nations people remain underrepresented in higher education, comprising just 1.9% of domestic university students despite making up 3.3% of the population. A recent study involv...

item.title: Majority of Metro Manila Bus Operators Failed to Meet 2025 Labor Standards
item.description: A report from the Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) revealed that a significant majority of bus operators in the National Capital Region (NCR) failed to comply with established labor standards...

item.title: Carragher Believes Arsenal Can Clinch Premier League Title With Win At West Ham
item.description: Former Liverpool defender Jamie Carragher don yarn say Arsenal fit wrap up the Premier League title this weekend after Manchester City draw with Everton. Naija News report say City settle for 3-3 draw...
